creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Bartek Jasicki from comment #12)

According to "Chapter 5. Listing of Installed Components" on README of Linux driver [1], it is NGX for Proton and Wine.
So possibly users of Wine on linux emulation (is there any?) want it.
Not sure such use case works or not.

[1] http://us.download.nvidia.com/XFree86/Linux-x86_64/525.89.02/README/installedcomponents.html
